meta.title: Schillings Digital Platform
meta.subtitle: Partner launch briefing
meta.openingStatement: The objective was to ensure the firm's online presence more accurately reflects the quality, discretion and sophistication of the work itself.

summary.whatPartnersShouldNotice: The platform now presents practitioner credibility and service context with greater consistency.

readinessStrip: UK, US and Ireland experiences aligned
Regional targeting and page consistency verified
Search presentation and crawl handling verified
Structured profile and editorial context preserved

annotations.text: Independent recognition and validation are presented more clearly.

observation.observation: Independent recognition and professional context are presented with greater clarity.
observation.whyItMatters: 96 practitioner profiles now use a more consistent validation structure.

examples.title: Expertise ownership clarity

annotations.text: Capability ownership and service framing are presented with greater clarity.

observation.observation: Expertise positioning and enquiry pathways are more clearly separated.
observation.whyItMatters: Service context is presented with less ambiguity.

examples.strategicImplication: This reduces overlap between narrative, editorial and commercial surfaces, so complex capabilities are presented more coherently.

annotations.text: Urgent response and enquiry pathways are now presented with greater clarity.

materiallyImprovedTable.improvement: More explicit capability ownership and service framing
Clearer distinction between commentary and expertise
More direct routing for high-intent enquiries
More consistent UK / US / Ireland positioning

partnerNarrative.internationalSummary: The platform uses a disciplined international structure with UK at the root domain, dedicated US and Ireland variants, and aligned regional targeting across true page equivalents.
partnerNarrative.operationalMaturityParagraph: Ownership across practitioner, expertise and editorial surfaces is more consistent, reducing inconsistency risk over time.
partnerNarrative.closingStrip: All substantive content remains human-written and human-reviewed. The platform was structured to support authority, clarity and discretion - rather than scaled content production.
